labels.notes: Marlene Greenfield 11:19 (15:19-17:20 UTC, 121 min, 3786 words) — INAPPROPRIATELY COMBINED with Tyler Sookraj seen ~1:30pm. Two-patient session that should have split. The 16-year-old son's vaccination content in Marlene's SOAP is actually Tyler. Detection events stop at 15:57:32 (after which a complete=True LLM decision should have triggered a split — but no split fired and no further detection events for 1h 23m). Multi-patient retrospective check did NOT trigger because it requires merge-back AND >=2500 words; merge_back_count=0 here. False G372A billing — there is NO injection in the transcript; the billing-LLM extracted im_injection_with_visit from 'vaccination update' Plan-line discussion (proposed, not performed). Diagnostic code 799 (wastebox fallback). Failure modes: detection-task-stopped-mid-session, multi-patient-retrospective-check-not-triggered (no merge-back precondition), billing-LLM-stance-blindness (proposed-as-performed), dx-799-fallback.
